expectations.text: Agent selects addParticipants (not createGroup, not send, not invite)
expectations.evidence: eval-1.md: 'Action: addParticipants' selected as Step 1 with explicit rejection of createGroup, send, and invite alternatives

expectations.text: participants array contains 972556839823@c.us (with @c.us suffix)
expectations.evidence: eval-1.md: 'participants': ['972556839823@c.us'] — @c.us suffix correctly applied

expectations.text: groupId is 120363421825201386@g.us (with @g.us suffix)
expectations.evidence: eval-1.md: 'groupId': '120363421825201386@g.us' — @g.us suffix correctly applied in both actions

expectations.text: Agent also calls promoteToAdmin as a follow-up action
expectations.evidence: eval-1.md: Step 2 explicitly calls promoteToAdmin: 'After adding the participant, use promoteToAdmin to grant admin role'

expectations.text: promoteToAdmin uses the same groupId and participant JID
expectations.evidence: eval-1.md: promoteToAdmin parameters show same groupId '120363421825201386@g.us' and participants ['972556839823@c.us']

expectations.text: Agent selects getInviteCode (not joinGroup, not getGroup, not createGroup)
expectations.evidence: eval-2.md: 'Action: getInviteCode' selected; explicitly states 'NOT joinGroup — that joins a group using a code, it does not retrieve a code; NOT getGroup'

expectations.text: groupId parameter is present and equals 120363421825201386@g.us
expectations.evidence: eval-2.md: Parameters show 'groupId': '120363421825201386@g.us'

expectations.text: Agent does NOT call send or any messaging action
expectations.evidence: eval-2.md: 'NOT any messaging action — this is a query operation, no message is sent'

expectations.text: Agent selects blockContact (not unblockContact, not delete, not muteChat)
expectations.evidence: eval-3.md: 'Action: blockContact' selected; explicitly states 'NOT unblockContact — that reverses a block; NOT delete — that deletes a chat; NOT muteChat'

expectations.text: contactId parameter uses @c.us suffix: 972556839823@c.us
expectations.evidence: eval-3.md: Parameters show 'contactId': '972556839823@c.us' — @c.us suffix correctly applied

expectations.text: Agent does NOT call getContacts or any listing action first
expectations.evidence: eval-3.md: 'The agent does NOT call getContacts or any listing action first — the contactId is already known from the phone number'

expectations.text: Agent calls getContactPicture with contactId 972556839823@c.us
expectations.evidence: eval-4.md: Action 1 is 'getContactPicture' with 'contactId': '972556839823@c.us'

expectations.text: Agent also calls getContactAbout with the same contactId
expectations.evidence: eval-4.md: Action 2 is 'getContactAbout' with 'contactId': '972556839823@c.us'

expectations.text: Both actions use @c.us suffix on the phone number
expectations.evidence: eval-4.md: Both getContactPicture and getContactAbout use '972556839823@c.us'

expectations.text: Agent does NOT conflate the two into a single action
expectations.evidence: eval-4.md: 'These are separate actions and must both be called. There is no single action that returns both.'

expectations.text: Agent does NOT call followChannel with the raw URL or the invite code string as channelId
expectations.evidence: eval-5.md: Two explicit 'WRONG approach (DO NOT DO THIS)' blocks showing URL and invite code as wrong channelId values

expectations.text: Agent identifies the need to resolve the invite code to a newsletter JID first
expectations.evidence: eval-5.md: 'The agent MUST NOT pass the URL or invite code directly to followChannel. The correct process is: 1. searchChannelsByText to find the channel JID'

expectations.text: If agent uses a single action, it uses followChannel with a @newsletter JID (not the URL)
expectations.evidence: eval-5.md: Step 2 shows followChannel with 'channelId': '120363421825201386@newsletter' — correct @newsletter JID format

expectations.text: Agent explains or demonstrates the two-step process: resolve invite code → follow channel
expectations.evidence: eval-5.md: Two-step process explicitly documented: Step 1 searchChannelsByText to get newsletter JID, Step 2 followChannel with that JID

expectations.text: Agent selects sendLocation (not send, not sendImage, not sendFile)
expectations.evidence: eval-6.md: 'Action: sendLocation' selected; explicitly states 'NOT send — that is for text messages; NOT sendImage — that is for image files; NOT sendFile'

expectations.text: latitude parameter is 32.0853
expectations.evidence: eval-6.md: Parameters show 'latitude': 32.0853

expectations.evidence: eval-6.md: Parameters show 'longitude': 34.7818

eval-6.md: Parameters show 'chatId': '120363421825201386@g.us'

expectations.text: Agent selects deleteGroup (not leaveGroup, not delete, not archiveChat)
expectations.evidence: eval-7.md: 'Action: deleteGroup' selected; disambiguation table explicitly contrasts deleteGroup vs leaveGroup vs delete; 'NOT leaveGroup — that only removes the bot; NOT delete — that is a chat management action'

expectations.text: groupId parameter is present and equals 120363421825201386@g.us
expectations.evidence: eval-7.md: Parameters show 'groupId': '120363421825201386@g.us'

expectations.text: Agent explains the distinction: deleteGroup permanently deletes the group, leaveGroup only removes the bot
expectations.evidence: eval-7.md: 'deleteGroup — Permanently removes the group from WhatsApp. All participants lose access. leaveGroup — The bot exits the group but the group continues to exist.'

expectations.text: Agent selects the read action (not readMessages, not getChatMessages)
expectations.evidence: eval-8.md: 'Action: read' selected; comparison table from messaging.md reproduced; 'NOT readMessages — that fetches message content, does not send read receipts; NOT getChatMessages'

expectations.text: chatId parameter is set to 120363421825201386@g.us
expectations.evidence: eval-8.md: Parameters show 'chatId': '120363421825201386@g.us'

expectations.text: Agent does NOT confuse read (send receipts) with readMessages (fetch content)
expectations.evidence: eval-8.md: Disambiguation table reproduced verbatim from messaging.md; explicit statement 'read — Standard action that sends WhatsApp read receipts; readMessages — Does NOT send read receipts. Does NOT affect the unread status.'
